notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
turn-001: P1 opened by taking the northeast and east centers while the guardian/marksman core moved toward the middle.
turn-002: P2 started the southern flank by taking west-south and pushing both scouts toward the southeast lane.
turn-003: P1 advanced into center-north and recruited a marksman from early center income.
turn-004: P2 flipped center-south and prepared a southeast wrap with a new raider.
turn-005: P1 claimed center-north and pressed toward the middle with the guardian/marksman core.
turn-006: P2 completed the southeast flank and chipped P1’s central raider from a legal scout attack.
turn-007: P1 took the exact middle, bloodied the forward southern scout, and added a guardian.
turn-008: P2 used the flank to threaten P1’s rear while healing the damaged scout enough to keep center-south contested.
turn-009: P1 collapsed onto the middle and killed P2’s damaged scout before it could flip center.
turn-010: P2 punished the center commitment by flipping east and damaging P1’s scout.
turn-011: P1 killed the flanking scout, but east remained contested because movement had already committed.
turn-012: P2’s raider and support core killed P1’s damaged raider and held the southern centers.
turn-013: P1 used the upgraded center guardian to kill P2’s support marksman and recruited another guardian.
turn-014: P2 re-flipped west-south and used healing/control buys to stabilize without taking a direct center fight.
turn-015: P1 held the middle and contested east but could not end the game before P2’s next flank wave.
